slides.text:
All of creation
All of the earth
Make straight a highway
A path for the Lord
Jesus is coming soon
slides.label: Verse 1

slides.text:
Call back the sinner
Wake up the saint
Let every nation
Shout of Your fame
Jesus is coming soon
slides.label: Verse 2

slides.text:
Like a bride
Waiting for her groom
We'll be a church
Ready for You
Every heart longing for our King
We sing
Even so come
Lord Jesus come
slides.label: Chorus

slides.text:
There will be justice
All will be new
Your name forever
Faithful and true
Jesus is coming soon
slides.label: Verse 3

slides.text:
So we wait
We wait for You
God we wait
You're coming soon
slides.label: Bridge
